```{r, setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F)
```

```{r}
x <- runif(10)
hist(x, col=rgb(0.5,0.5,0.5,alpha=0.6), freq=T, breaks=10, bord=FALSE, main="", xlim = c(0,1), xlab="a", ylim = c(0,2))
```

```{r}
getwd()
file.path("book/1")
```


```{r}
getwd()
wDir = getwd()
# change path or create a new path
change_path <- function(path_name){ # "path_name" can be string or variable
  if (file.exists(file.path(path_name))){
    setwd(file.path(path_name))
  } else {
    dir.create(file.path(path_name))
    setwd(file.path(path_name))
  }
}
change_path("book")
getwd()
change_path("book/book/")
getwd()
setwd(wDir)
getwd()
```

```{r}
# x remove "/" in a list of string
remove_slash <- function(list){
  for (i in 1:length(list)) {
    list[i] = gsub("/", " ", list[i])
  }
  return(list)
}

a = c("a/v","v/d", "a/r")
remove_slash(a)
```

```{r}

knitr::include_graphics("C:\\Users\\ALEX\\Desktop\\test1\\Herbicide\\img\\Farmer A\\hist_Clethodim.png")

```

```{r}

```
